Kuro? Was that the black cat who stopped
by the Casino earlier?

It was really lively earlier. Maybe Kuro
caused a ruckus by the front entrance?

Seems like he went right back to
the Shopping Plaza afterwards, so I
can't say much more.
En cualquier caso, ya estas aqui, asi que...
